creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
Please apply "ports/139173" first as it requires that PR for "Mail::Cache".


This provides methods for caching mail information for
Mail::IMAPTalk using Mail::Cache.

WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Mail-IMAPTalk-MailCache

How-To-Repeat: 

1: apply "ports/139173"
2: unshar
3: install and enjoy
